title: Support for right-aligned modules before line_break
body:
## Feature Request

Some custom zsh prompts support right-aligning some elements. For example, my current zsh prompt looks like this (the time part is right-aligned on the first line):

![Screen Shot 2019-10-06 at 19 55 46](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/198359/66269541-c83f8580-e873-11e9-8ea2-6afe031f8046.png)

Note that this is about right-aligning parts that come before the last line break. It is different from `RPROMPT`, which is for right-aligning an additional prompt on the same line as the input.

#### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
No.

#### Describe the solution you'd like
A new `alignment` option that affects a module's alignment.
A module is right-aligned if `alignment = "right"`, and there's a `line_break` module that comes after it in `prompt_order`.

#### Describe alternatives you've considered
1. Make `prompt_order` support a new structure other than a flat list.
2. Add a `right_align` module that changes layout direction until the next `line_break`. It's kind of like Unicode's right-to-left mark.

title: Powerline prompt
body:
## Feature Request

I would like to have a prompt with PowerLine characters to make it beautiful

#### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I have an issue when [...] -->
I tried with this config

```toml
add_newline = false

[character]
symbol = ""

[git_status]
show_sync_count = true
prefix = " "
suffix = " "
style = "bg:red fg:white"
```

But it is not what i expected

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6325757/66710037-af9e0680-ed70-11e9-9d9f-e16d9c4acbc5.png)



#### Describe the solution you'd like
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Add any considered drawbacks. -->

Maybe i will have to wait this issues to be solved

https://github.com/starship/starship/pull/378

https://github.com/starship/starship/issues/346

https://github.com/starship/starship/issues/243

#### Describe alternatives you've considered
<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->
Nerd Fonts shows a prompt with PowerLine on [the home page](https://www.nerdfonts.com/)
[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/gh-pages/assets/img/nerd-fonts-powerline-extra-terminal.png)](https://github.com/ryanoasis/nerd-fonts/blob/gh-pages/assets/img/nerd-fonts-powerline-extra-terminal.png)

[BobTheFish](https://github.com/oh-my-fish/theme-bobthefish) is a theme that use PowerLine
[![](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/53660/16141577/0134763a-3412-11e6-9cca-6040d39c8fd4.png)](https://github.com/oh-my-fish/theme-bobthefish)
